description: Create a comprehensive homophone management system for legal transcription in Talon Voice within the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\homophone_system\. The system must consist of four files: a homophones.csv file containing at least 20 homophone groups including the 15 specific legal pairs (statute/statue, counsel/council, precedent/president, waiver/waver, plaintiff/plaintive, bail/bale, lien/lean, tort/torte, cite/site/sight, indict/indite, canon/cannon, principal/principle, assent/ascent, discrete/discreet, and elicit/illicit); a homophone_manager.py script that imports from talon, creates a Module, and registers the actions user.homophones_get(word: str), user.homophones_cycle(word: str), user.homophones_add(word1: str, word2: str), and user.homophones_show(word: str); a homophone_commands.talon file defining the voice commands "phones", "phone that", "phone pick", "phone add", and "phone list"; and a legal_terms.talon-list file starting with the header "list: user.legal_terms" containing at least 25 legal terms formatted as "spoken form: output form" pairs.
